user.title: Configure QWeather Pro
user.description:
### ⚙️ Setup Steps 
 **Go to the [QWeather Console](https://console.qweather.com):** 
 1. In Settings, copy the **API Host** and fill it into the **API Host** field below. 
 2. Project Management → Create a project, then add credentials to the project: optional **JSON Web Token** and **API KEY**.
 3. The location only supports latitude and longitude (WGS-84), for example: 116.40,39.90. 
 The default location is the HA latitude and longitude. 
 #### Note: **API KEY** authentication does not provide sufficient security. All requests using **API KEY** authentication are subject to rate limits. It is recommended to use **JSON Web Token (JWT)** authentication!

data.location_id: Geographical location. Only supports latitude and longitude (longitude first).
data.api_key: Ordinary API Key (Leave blank if using JWT)

jwt_setup.title: Configure JWT Security Authentication
jwt_setup.description:
A public key has been automatically generated for you.

**Steps:**
1. Copy the **public key** in the box below.
2. Go to the [QWeather Console](https://console.qweather.com), add a credential to your project, select **JSON Web Token**, and paste the public key.

```text
{public_key}
```

After completing this, fill in the **Project ID** and **Key ID** below.
### Note: JWT authentication can only be added once. If you re-add the integration, the original JWT credential will no longer be valid.

select_location.title: Confirm Location
select_location.description: Multiple matching regions were found. Please select the most accurate one:

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Authentication
reconfigure.description: Your integration may have stopped working due to invalid authentication. Please update your API Host or key here.

error.cannot_connect: Network connection failed, please check whether the Host is correct
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed, please check your Key or JWT
error.api_key_missing: API Key is required in standard mode
error.api_host_deprecated: Public API domains are no longer supported, please use your personal API Host
error.location_not_found: Location not found, please try entering latitude and longitude

abort.already_configured: This location has already been configured

init.title: Integration Options
init.description:
### 💡 Instructions for Use
- The daily weather forecast can be set to **3d/7d/15d/30d** days, while the grid-based daily forecast only supports **3d/7d** days. 
- The hourly forecast can be set to **24h/72h/168h** hours, while the grid-based hourly forecast only supports **24h/72h** hours.
- **Grid Weather**: After enabling the high-precision grid API, some observed data (such as **visibility**) will no longer be available and will appear as `--` in the card.
